title: MolluscaGenes species_metadata.tsv

species_binomial.description: Genus + species (or Genus sp. for unidentified), space-separated.

ncbi_taxid.description: NCBI taxonomy ID; may be empty for undescribed species or unmatched names.

phylum.description: From NCBI taxonomy lineage. Usually Mollusca.

subclass.description: From NCBI taxonomy lineage; often empty.

worms_aphia_id.description: WoRMS (World Register of Marine Species) AphiaID; may be empty.

n_proteins.description: Count of protein sequences in mollusca_aa for this species.

n_transcripts.description: Count of nucleotide transcripts in mollusca_mrna for this species.

mean_protein_len.description: Mean protein length (residues) across this species.

data_source.description: Source workflow. 'EvidentialGene assembly' for species with sequences; empty otherwise.

source_accession.description: Upstream accession if known. v0.1 leaves this mostly empty; v1.0 will populate from NCBI BioProject linkage.

sequencing_type.description: 'transcriptome' for species with sequences; empty for dict-only entries.

reference_citation_doi.description: DOI of source publication if known. v0.1 leaves this empty; v1.0 will populate via NCBI BioProject linkage.

notes: Species with n_proteins=0 and n_transcripts=0 are listed for transparency: they were planned for inclusion but no sequences are in this release.
v1.0 will add BUSCO completeness, source_accession, and reference_citation_doi.
